Patch Set 4:

Fix the bug of HSM: Using liblustre_hsm API to send a RESTORE hsm request, and follow with a REMOVE hsm request, the REMOVE hsm request will be ignored.
For RW-PCC, when detach the file, automatically restore the file and remove the pcc cached file.

(1 comment)

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1

(4 comments)

This patch looks like it contains things that should be part of other patches, particularly in pcc.c.  And I don't mean "I think this should be in another patch" (like the pcc_inode->inode swap), it looks like a mistake in patch management...?

I'd like to clear that up before I keep going with this patch, since I'm not sure what should be in it.

parents.subject: LU-10602 llite: add file heat support

commit.subject: LU-10602 pcc: file heat support for PCC
commit.message:
LU-10602 pcc: file heat support for PCC

Add file heat statistics for PCC cached files.
Add Lustre API to get PCC cache state and file heat information
by FID. These information can be used to determine whether a file
is a good candidate to fetch into PCC cache.

Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I31e6ca6ce87fa7c5aa751ab062c0022ce1d69603
